name: list_notes
description: List and search Google Keep notes. Supports filtering by text query, label, pinned state, and trashed state. Returns up to 50 note summaries.

query.description: Text to search for in note titles and content.

pinned.description: If true, return only pinned notes. If false, return only unpinned notes. Omit to return both.

trashed.description: If true, return only trashed notes. Defaults to false (non-trashed notes only).
